name: @intentsolutionsio/browser-compatibility-tester
description: Cross-browser testing with Playwright, BrowserStack, Sauce Labs, LambdaTest, and Kobiton - test across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge on real devices

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install browser-compatibility-tester\\n  or /plugin install browser-compatibility-tester@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
